title: Bare Bones x Netherite stone
description: Just like the trailers! And hides the texture from stones and ores.
body:
**This pack prevents players from using math, bedrock patterns, and block rotations to locate bases on servers like Donut SMP while keeping the simple vibrant Bare Bones style that focuses on Minecrafts colorful essentials.**
 
 **Without the pack (only Bare Bones)** ![Without the pack (only Bare Bones)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cb7ebe97b464886308f8b96222c44fa35e9de0c.png)
 **With the pack** ![With the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b4b1513d0fe48ba61b439bac35f107e0f5b41c0_0.webp)
